famous quote:
"Child, to say the very thing you really mean, the whole of it, nothing more or less or other than what you really mean; that's the whole art and joy of words."
-- C.S. Lewis
Interview Text:
Hannah Noble:

(part 3)

Hannah and her friend weren't high in the ranks but they had a lot of things they had their hands in. They asked themselves "Why would we get these dreams?" They think it was because no one else was paying attention. She said, "If you expect the Lord to speak, there is always room for that. A lot of people loved Jesus at that church but there wasn't an expectation that Jesus would meet them. Also the Lord uses people you wouldn't expect. He used tax collectors and prostitutes when kings weren't listening."

Hannah and David moved away in 2019. About that time, they had an atopic pregnancy. (This means her baby was forming outside of her tubes). It was on her right side. They did surgery and removed the tube, and she was going through the healing process. But there was so much going on that year, this was just another thing. They kept saying, "It could be worse" over and over. But when she went into surgery for the atopic pregnancy, David said, "The worst has found us." 

Their friend who was a pastor at their old church was the first to come over and bring a meal and listen to all we were going through. He had been experiencing very hard things in his life as well. They asked him, "Why are so many people from this church going through such oddly specific painful things?" He said, "Because the meat was better in Egypt." This started this wilderness for her.
Music Video Instructions: Ask God to bring you to life.
